steps.title: Find the shared point
steps.content: Text 1 says O'odham farmers plant mesquite with agaves so the trees provide shade and protect agaves from heat and light. Text 2 repeats that agaves grow best when shaded by sun-hardy species like mesquite.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: B compares advantages that Text 2 does not discuss. C speculates about refining the solar-panel method. D reverses the texts by saying agaves do not need shade. The shared point is mesquite shade protecting agaves. The answer is A.
